title: ReleaseArtifactAttestationV1
description: Governed artifact attestation: binds a specific artifact hash to release provenance and commit lineage. Immutable after registration.

attestation_id.description: Unique identifier for this attestation record.

release_id.description: release_id from release_provenance_registry. Must exist and be PENDING or RELEASED.

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 of the artifact content. Must match the artifact_hash in the release provenance record.

artifact_media_type.description: MIME type of the artifact (e.g. application/gzip, application/octet-stream).

commit_sha.description: Must match commit_sha in release_provenance_registry for the referenced release_id.

workflow_hash.description: Must match workflow_hash in release_provenance_registry. Ensures attestation is from the same governed workflow.

release_lineage_hash.description: Must match release_lineage_hash in release_provenance_registry. Binds attestation to exact lineage.

attestation_hash.description: SHA-256 over (release_id, artifact_name, artifact_hash, artifact_media_type, commit_sha, workflow_hash, release_lineage_hash, validation_proof_id). Unique attestation identity.

validation_proof_id.description: Must match validation_proof_id in the referenced release provenance record.

status.description: Attestation lifecycle state. Only ATTESTED is canonical.
